page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC467; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

MUSC469 Orchestral Excerpts for String Players (1 Credit)

In-depth study of the orchestral excerpts required for professional orchestra auditions.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC469, MUSC448B, MUSC448Q, MUSC448V, or MUSC448x.
